subject: DevOps
title: Software Composition Analysis (SCA)
description: Learn Software Composition Analysis (SCA) in one minute.

hook.text: Log4Shell hit thousands of companies. Most didn't know they used Log4j. SCA would have told them.

buildup.text: Modern apps are 80% third-party code. Every package and library is a potential vulnerability source.

discovery.text: SCA tools scan dependencies and match them against known vulnerability databases like the NVD.

twist.text: SCA also checks licenses. A GPL library in commercial code may violate terms. SCA catches that too.

climax.text: Snyk, Dependabot, and Mend scan dependencies nonstop. When a new CVE drops, they alert you fast.

punchline.text: Know your dependencies. SCA finds hidden flaws in others' code.

quiz.question: What does Software Composition Analysis (SCA) scan?
options: Third-party dependencies for known vulnerabilities and license issues
Application source code for coding style violations
